mapper.select: SELECT #{examId} AS examId, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS submittedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS gradedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS publishedCount, ROUND(AVG(total_score), 2) AS averageScore, MAX(total_score) AS maxScore, MIN(CASE WHEN total_score IS NOT NULL THEN total_score END) AS minScore, SUM(CASE WHEN is_passed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passedCount, ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN is_passed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) END, 4) AS passRate FROM grade_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND exam_id = #{examId}

SELECT bucket.range AS range, COUNT(1) AS count, ROUND(COUNT(1) * 1.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND exam_id = #{examId} AND total_score IS NOT NULL), 4) AS ratio FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN total_score >= 90 THEN '90-100' WHEN total_score >= 80 THEN '80-89' WHEN total_score >= 70 THEN '70-79' WHEN total_score >= 60 THEN '60-69' WHEN total_score >= 0 THEN '0-59' ELSE 'N/A' END AS range FROM grade_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND exam_id = #{examId} AND total_score IS NOT NULL ) bucket GROUP BY bucket.range ORDER BY bucket.range DESC
